name: Swift Title Loans
description_short: 1902 E Arkansas Ln in Arlington, TX — Swift Title Loans offers same-day title loans and payday loans for quick cash.
description_long:
Swift Title Loans is located at 1902 E Arkansas Ln, Suite 110, in Arlington, TX. This standalone storefront is open Monday through Friday from 9:00 AM to 7:00 PM and Saturday from 10:00 AM to 5:00 PM (closed Sundays). The location serves the Arlington community with convenient access.

At the Arlington branch, Swift Title Loans specializes in title loans and payday loans designed for residents who need fast funding. Call 682-435-0260 to discuss your loan options or visit in person during business hours. Our lending specialists can explain approval timelines and help you understand loan terms available to Texas borrowers.

When visiting the Arlington store, bring a valid photo ID, proof of income, and vehicle documentation (for title loans). Title loans are often processed faster than traditional bank loans, making them ideal for unexpected expenses. Swift Title Loans provides transparent lending with same-day approval options.
pros: Same-day or next-day funding available with noon sign-up deadline
Loan amounts range from $100–$50,000 to accommodate various emergency and larger needs
Accepts applicants with bad credit, past bankruptcies, and no collateral (personal loan options)
Customers retain use of vehicle while borrowing against title
Named staff member (Alfred) consistently praised for patient explanations and personalized service
Extended weekday hours (9am–7pm Mon–Fri) and Saturday availability (10am–5pm)
Website features 256-bit SSL and TLS security encryption for data protection
cons: No interest rates or APR disclosed on website, making cost comparison impossible
Limited hours (closed Sundays, no evening appointments after 7pm)
Crowded parking lot reported by customers
Physical office-dependent process; online application available but in-person visit likely required
No payment plan diversity or mobile app for account management per customer feedback
best_for: Consumers with bad credit or past bankruptcies needing $100–$2,000 emergency cash
Vehicle owners who need quick liquidity but want to keep driving their car
Borrowers seeking personalized, in-person service with transparent terms explained clearly
People rejected by traditional banks and seeking alternative same-day lending
diagnosis: Swift Title Loans is best for consumers in financial emergencies with bad credit who own vehicles and need $100–$2,000 fast. The main caveat is that title loans carry high interest rates (not disclosed on website) and create default risk if borrowers cannot repay; this is a high-cost emergency option, not a sustainable solution. Verify APR and terms carefully before committing.
services: Car title loans ($100–$2,000 quick emergency loans)
Personal loans with no collateral required
In-person loan processing at Memphis location
Same-day or next-day funding upon approval
Customer retention of vehicle during loan term
Competitive rate matching for regional finance customers
meta_description: Swift Title Loans at 1902 E Arkansas Ln, Arlington, TX. Same-day title and payday loans with fast approvals.
